frmrelatorio::btnReport.Click
* Fim **************************************************************************************

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lcSql = [Select a.iclis,a.rclis,a.grupos,a.situas,a.Cpfs,a.inativas,a.ContaMats,a.Emps ] + ; 			[From SigCdCli a ] + ; 			[Inner Join SigCdGcr b On a.Grupos = b.Codigos  ] + ; 			[And (Not b.Coletors = 10 Or (b.Coletors = 10  ] + ; 			[And a.IClis Not In (Select Distinct c.Jobs From SigCdAcJ c ] + ; 									[Where c.Jobs Not In (Select Distinct d.Jobs From SigCdAcJ d Where d.Usuars = ']+This.Value+[')))) ] + ; 			[And a.grupos = ']+LocalPam.GrPadVens+[' ]... [TRUNCADO]
